description_long: This is a bright red baseball cap featuring a structured, rounded crown and a curved brim. The front panel displays a large circular campaign graphic with a photograph of a smiling man, the text 'VEREADOR DARK', and the number '13444' in bold white and red letters. The cap is made from a smooth, likely synthetic fabric, giving it a matte finish. The back of the cap has an open section, typical of adjustable baseball caps, though the adjustment mechanism is not visible. The overall construction appears lightweight and designed for casual, everyday wear in urban environments. The cap's vibrant color and prominent graphic make it highly noticeable.
description: A bright red baseball cap with a curved brim and a large campaign graphic on the front, featuring text and a photograph. The cap is lightweight, smooth, and visually striking.
description_view_0: Front view shows the campaign graphic with text and a photograph prominently displayed on the crown.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the smooth, uninterrupted red fabric and the curvature of the brim.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the open back section typical of adjustable baseball caps, with no visible adjustment strap.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the cap's clean red surface and the edge of the front graphic.
